subcodes.first_line: O thou who art low in age but high in rank! Thou hast attained, in thy childhood, to such a station that the Lord of all humanity hath mentioned thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صغیر السن یا کبیر المقام
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for protection, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
